title: elytrigia obtusiflora
intro: Elytrigia obtusiflora, also known as rough meadow-grass or rough wildrye, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elytrigia obtusiflora include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Elytrigia obtusiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine for its supposed ability to treat various ailments.
